Unit 1

This is where you can find the projects that I worked on throughout Unit 1.

The first task I worked on was learning how to program. Lesson 1 - Intro to Programming - required us to use Scratch Coding to create different shapes. To showcase our understanding of this lesson, we had to create a screen recording of the different shapes we tried out. Below, you can find the screen recording of my work.



The next project that I worked on was building a PC. In this project we used a website called PC Part Picker to create a PC. Then, we had to use another webstie called Cyberpunk wher we had to create a PC that fit the system requirements. Below you can see an image of the PC that I built.

The third project that I worked on in Unit 1 was learning about pseudocode. In this task, we had to use pseudocode to creat a Peanut butter and Jam sandwich. We created the psuedocode and sent it to a ChatGPT platform which graded our codes. Chat GPT gave ma 95/100 on this task.
Click here to view my pseudocode!

The final project that I worked on in this unit was Lesson 5 - Implementing Algorithms. In this lesson we had to create a project on scratch using everything we had learnt in the unit as well as other challenges. Below is a screen recording of the work from this lesson.
